questions_to_answer: What specific data source will be used for ingestion?
What format will the data be in (e.g., JSON, CSV, etc.)?
Are there specific fields in the data that need to be aggregated, and how should this aggregation be performed?
What is the preferred format for the report (e.g., PDF, Excel, etc.)?
Are there any specific criteria for sending the report to the admin (e.g., timing, content of the email)?
Is there a preferred method for scheduling the data ingestion (e.g., specific time, timezone)?
